name: Devil's Share
descs:
Turn End: apply 1 [Agility] next turn to 1 ally with the highest [Breath] Potency and 1 ally with the highest [Breath] Count. (both effects can apply on the same Identity)

If the ally has Lust Affinity Attack Skills, apply 2 [Agility] instead. (except E.G.O Skills)

Turn End: apply 1 [Agility] and 1 [AttackUp] next turn to 1 ally with the highest [Breath] Potency and 1 ally with the highest [Breath] Count. (both effects can apply on the same Identity)

If the ally has Lust Affinity Attack Skills, apply 2 [Agility] and 2 [AttackUp] instead. (except E.G.O Skills)

Turn End: apply 1 [Agility], 1 [AttackUp], and 1 [AttackDmgUp] next turn to 1 ally with the highest [Breath] Potency and 1 ally with the highest [Breath] Count. (both effects can apply on the same Identity)

If the ally has Lust Affinity Attack Skills, apply 2 [Agility], 2 [AttackUp], and 2 [AttackDmgUp] instead. (except E.G.O Skills)
